title: Homogeneous Dirt
description: Homogeneous Dirt is a resource pack that homogenizes all of the dirt-related textures!
body:
Homogeneous Dirt

- All dirt textures have been changed to look more **clumped together**, and less **noisy looking**. - The textures are based on the **packed mud** texture since mud is just dirt, but with too much waterTM - The coarse dirt texture now looks **coherent**, and isn't just a **charred** version of the dirt texture. - Improved the grass top and side textures by removing unnecessary colors. - Updated all of the dirt UI background textures to the new dirt textures. Here's every single block/texture that was changed; I may add support for mods in the future if that's something people want.
   ‒  Coarse Dirt, Dirt, Dirt Path, Grass Block, Mycelium, Podzol, Rooted Dirt, and every single dirt UI element. I won't update the panoramas with the new textures because that would massively increase the file size, and I would then have to make one for every single version that has a unique panorama. --- **Homogenized textures!** - Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest)
|

TL;DR Card

The dirt textures have been brought up to
standard while keeping the same "feel" as the
original programmer textures.

Drastically reduced the amount of noise, and
unnecessary colors:
 • Grass Block went from 63 colors to 8 colors.
 • Coarse Dirt went from 77 colors to 11 colors. || |:--- |:---:|
